final_review: The DEVAS team built a comprehensive platform for budget management, including features like AI-driven anomaly detection, multi-year budget data analysis, and a user-friendly interface using React.js, Next.js, MongoDB, Express.js, and OpenAI APIs. They started with setting up the project structure and gradually added more complex features, demonstrating a clear development pattern of starting with setup and progressing to features. The code quality varied; some commits were well-structured and focused on building features (scores 7-12), while others were generic or AI-generated (scores 1-6). Standout commits included the budget schema creation, anomaly detection feature, and AI prompt generation for AI fault detection. There were no wasted commits in terms of merge operations or empty files. The project is functional but lacks some additional features like detailed reports and export options. Overall, the DEVAS team demonstrated a good understanding of their technology stack and built a solid foundation for a budget management system.
